title: Kikinda, Vojvodina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kikinda, Vojvodina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kikinda is a city in Vojvodina with a population of 38,000. A city in northern Vojvodina known for its annual Pumpkin Festival, the historic Kikinda Fortress, and its role as an agricultural center.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
